name: braxebrowser
description: Privacy-focused browser foundation with Electron, React, and TypeScript.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n RENDERER,MAIN,ELECTRON -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix renderer" "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist/main/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 nodemon --watch dist/main --ext js --exec "electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
